name: python3-itypes
title: python3-itypes
summary: Python3 basic immutable containers types library
description:
Python3 basic immutable containers types library
This package provides basic immutable container types for Python.
.
The classic use case of these is in circumstances where it may result in more
comprehensible code, or when one wants to create custom types with restricted,
immutable interfaces.
.
This package contains the python3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-itypes because Python3 basic immutable containers types library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-itypes as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-itypes with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-itypes --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
